deferred_items.description: Generalization beyond coordinatewise order remains deferred.
deferred_items.reason: The next proof attempt should avoid broad partial-order claims until the restricted theorem is audited.

deferred_items.description: Deriving strict activation margin from still more primitive properties remains deferred.
deferred_items.reason: The current analysis treats strict margin as an explicit sufficient assumption, not as a derived fact.

gap_resolution_findings.name: strict activation margin
gap_resolution_findings.resolution_statement: Require a primitive strict activation margin: at the witness pair, the activation map is strictly increasing over the ledger-readout interval created by the persistent ledger advantage.
gap_resolution_findings.why_this_is_not_circular: The condition is stated on the activation map and ledger-readout interval, not on the final ledger_effect_size conclusion.

gap_resolution_findings.name: coordinatewise order restriction
gap_resolution_findings.resolution_statement: Restrict the next theorem to finite real-valued toy states in [0,1]^V with coordinatewise order.
gap_resolution_findings.why_this_is_not_circular: The order is fixed before the proof and does not depend on the witness conclusion.

planned_next_theorem.name: restricted structural witness strict positivity theorem
planned_next_theorem.planned_statement: In the finite coordinatewise toy domain, if the restricted structural witness conditions RSW-VF-H2-001 through RSW-VF-H2-007 hold, then ledger_effect_size > 0.

proof_readiness_checks.description: The strict margin condition is now a primitive assumption rather than a conclusion.
The next proof is restricted to coordinatewise order, avoiding unspecified partial-order generalization.
The theorem remains safe abstract toy only.
No new theorem is proved in the analysis.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: finite coordinatewise state domain
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: V is finite and x_t is in [0,1]^V with coordinatewise order.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: matched coupled processes
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: Memory-ledger and null processes share initial state, horizon, graph, and symbolic inputs.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: decomposed monotonicity
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: Ledger increments are nonnegative, ledger readout is order-preserving, the state component is order-preserving, and activation is monotone in ledger readout.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: strict local ledger readout advantage
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: At a reachable witness pair, persistent ledger readout is strictly greater than null ledger readout.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: strict activation margin
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: At the witness pair, the activation map is strictly increasing over the relevant ledger-readout interval.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: non-saturation
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: The witness coordinate is not clipped or saturated in a way that removes the strict activation difference.

restricted_structural_witness_conditions.name: positive aggregation witness weight
restricted_structural_witness_conditions.statement: The witness node-time pair has strictly positive aggregation weight and all aggregation weights are nonnegative.
